kaalsarp_dosha.bot_response: You do not have Kaal-Sarp dosha
remedies: Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. A person having Kaal Sarpa Yoga in his/her kundli should worship Lord Shiva regularly and for better results, one can also chant the Moola Mantra of Lord Shiva. “Om Namah Shivaya”(ॐ नमः शिवाय). This mantra acts as a Kaal Sarpa Dosha Nivaran mantra. The students who are affected by the malefic effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga should chant the Moola Mantra of Goddess Sarasvati. Chanting the Moola mantra will enhance the concentration power of the students and as a result, they will be able to perform better. ‘Om SaraswatiMayaa Drishtwa, VeenaPustak Dharnim| HansVahini Samayuktaa MaaVidya DaanKarotu Me Om’

Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. In an auspicious Muhurat, offer three pieces of coal in flowing water, one at a time. It is one of the best Kaal Sarpa Dosh remedies. This will nullify the effect of Kaal Sarpa Dosh from the native’s horoscope and he/she would be able to lead a more peaceful and happy life.Chanting Hanuman Chalisa 108 times regularly is highly beneficial for the natives who are suffering from Kaal Sarpa Yoga. The people who are affected by this yoga can also visit Lord Hanuman’s Mandir and can apply a Tilak of Sindhoor from the idol of Lord Hanuman.

Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. Chanting Maha Mrityunjaya Mantra 108 times on a Rudraksha Rosary will help the native in getting rid of the Kaal Sarpa Yoga.'Om Tayambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pustivardhanam. Urvarukamiva Bandhanan Mrtyor Muksiya Mamratat’.
Keeping a peacock’s feather in the home will reduce the effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga. Children can also keep it in their books for enhancing their concentration level.

On every Saturday, worshipping Lord Shani and chanting the Moola Mantra of Lord Shani will reduce the effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga. People can also offer sesame and black gram to Lord Shani.‘Om Shani Charaya Namaha’

Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. Place the Kaal Sarpa Yoga Yantra in your home in an auspicious Mahurat to get rid of the Kaal sarpa Yoga. You can also chant this Moola mantra for energizing the yantra. “Bramha Muri Tripurantkari Bhanuh Shashih BhumiSuto Budhashch”
Do pooja on Naag Panchami and after the pooja, make sure that the snake charmer frees the snake in an open ground.

General Shiva Pooja. Even a general Shiva Pooja where one would chant a certain Stotra of Lord Shiva will also reduce the impact of Kaal Sarpaa Dosha. This will please Lord Shiva who can remove all the problems from a natives life. This canting of the mantras in the pooja should be done religiously and with an outbreak.

Do Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja. On every Monday, on the same place and time, offer a handful of wheat, shrivel and a coin of 1, 2, 5, or 10. Chant the name of Lord Rama while offering all these things. Make sure that you take the same value of the coin on every Monday. Perform this cycle of activities for 21 Mondays and get rid of this Yoga.

personal_characteristics.personalised_prediction: Since the  1st lord, Saturn is in the 10th house, Discipline and dedication lead to a stable, albeit delayed, career growth. A strong work ethic ensures success in structured fields like law or administration.

Since the  2nd lord, Saturn is in the 10th house, You will succeed only through hard work and perseverance. Opportunities will not come easily, requiring significant effort. You may have a strained relationship with your father and could become a workaholic.

Since the  3rd lord, Jupiter is in the 11th house, You can work as a finance manager or a business analyst in some big organizations. You also work for the government and formulate finance policies. You shall have a transformative relationship with your sibling. You may earn huge profits sometimes or may incur huge losses.

Since the  4th lord, Mars is in the 1st house, You are the real protector of the homeland or the nation. You shall have a good carer in the army or the police. You may also be attracted to real estate. Your relationship with your mother will be good and loving.

Since the  5th lord, Venus is in the 12th house, You shall earn happiness by visiting religious and spiritual places. You will love reading ancient texts from different religions. You may even find your love interest in a spiritual place. You will not be attracted to money and status.

Since the  6th lord, Mercury is in the 12th house, You will be curious to learn about different religions and philosophies of the world. Later on, in life, you will use these philosophies to preach people on how to remove obstacles from one's life.

Since the  7th lord, Moon is in the 1st house, You shall always want to have emotional security in relations and will want your spouse to understand your emotional nature. Your spouse will be practical by nature and will want to find happiness in your relationship.

Since the  8th lord, Sun is in the 12th house, You are likely to get higher education from a foreign land. You will travel far to get an education. You may  work as a lecturer or educator in any foreign institute.

Since the  9th lord, Mercury is in the 12th house, You shall be ever thirsty of receiving knowledge about religion and spirituality. You can be very analytical, critical and perfectionist by nature. You can become an amazing writer.

Since the  10th lord, Venus is in the 12th house, You shall be a very nourishing people and will want to serve others. So you may work in the hospitals as a nurse or caretakers. You can also do well in the software industry or may work behind the scenes like a director or writer.

Since the  11th lord, Mars is in the 1st house, You will have a direct and harsh speech and will have a dominating nature towards others. You will also be harsh towards your siblings and will be impulse oriented person. You act first without any prior planning. You may work in defense and security agencies.

Since the  12th lord, Jupiter is in the 11th house, You shall use your knowledge of occult and mysticism to serve other people and to bring a change into the world. Counseling and teaching shall be the beneficial career for you. Your flow of income shall go through a lot of transformation in life.
